                    <div id="speed-tab" class="clearfix eael-tab-content-item inactive" data-title-link="speed-tab">
				        <p><span style="font-weight: 400">A typical pilot only takes 30-6</span>0 days for an enterprise deployment for any use case.  </p><p><span style="font-weight: 400">We specialize in rapidly deploying advanced telemetry solutions that efficiently capture and analyze data across various assets and locations.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400">What truly sets us apart is our deployment speed.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400">While traditional systems can take months to implement, our innovative technology allows you to deploy solutions in days, not months.</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: 400">This rapid deployment means you can quickly adapt to changing needs and begin reaping the benefits of your investment sooner. Experience the future of connectivity and efficiency with our unparalleled infrastructure.</span></p>                    </div>
		        
                    <div id="non-disruptive-tab" class="clearfix eael-tab-content-item inactive" data-title-link="non-disruptive-tab">
				        <ul><li>Easy to Install: Our solutions are designed for quick and hassle-free installation.</li><li>Mobile Secure Connection: We provide a secure mobile connection that you can rely on.</li><li>No Interruptions: Our integration process ensures that there are no disruptions to your operations.</li><li>No Firewall or Network IT Management Required: You won’t have to deal with complex firewalls or network IT issues during initial setup.</li><li>Integration at Your Pace: You choose when to integrate with your existing systems—there is no pressure to rush into it. </li><li>Focus on Your Business: You can continue to focus on your operations while we enhance connectivity and security for you.</li></ul>                    </div>
		        
                    <div id="industrial-atex--tab" class="clearfix eael-tab-content-item inactive" data-title-link="industrial-atex--tab">
				        <ul><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">A comprehensive range of ATEX-certified industrial sensors, trackers, and nodes for safety and reliability in hazardous environments.  </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">This is Abeeway’s most advanced set of trackers, with ATEX zones 0, 1, and 2 for worker safety, asset tracking, and theft prevention.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Advanced predictive maintenance solutions from leading brands, including Watteco, Asystom, and Advantech.  </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Variety of sensors for pressure measurement and level detection from Watteco, RIOT, Daviteq,  and others. </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Digital nodes are designed to gather data from any machine, meter, pipe, or equipment.   Modbus, MQTT, BACnet, Profinet, and OPC  allow us to talk to any PLC or control board.</span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Solutions to monitor and optimize operations effectively, enhancing productivity and minimizing downtime.  </span></li></ul>                    </div>
		        
                    <div id="plug-n-play-tab" class="clearfix eael-tab-content-item inactive" data-title-link="plug-n-play-tab">
				        <ul><li>Comprehensive pre-staging and testing processes ensure all components are fully operational before shipping.  </li><li>Guaranteed functionality right out of the box upon arrival.  </li><li>Sensors are battery-operated and portable, reducing the need for complicated installation.  </li><li>Minimal or no setup required—simply unpack, turn on, and go.  </li><li>Get up and running in just minutes, avoiding lengthy delays typical of traditional systems.  </li><li>Start reaping the benefits of our technology almost immediately, enhancing your productivity and efficiency.  </li><li>Experience ease of use and quick activation, allowing for seamless integration into your operations with minimal effort.  </li></ul>                    </div>
		        
                    <div id="ai-enabled-real-time-tab" class="clearfix eael-tab-content-item inactive" data-title-link="ai-enabled-real-time-tab">
				        <p><span style="font-weight: 400">Senzary and our enterprise-level, secure, and scalable IoTLogIQ platform act as middleware in your environment or in the cloud, enabling the following:</span></p><ul><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Contextual data, across sites and locations </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Emphasis on the value of real-time information for timely assessment and response  </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Flexibility to combine process-related data from various systems and external sources  </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Efficient management of large volumes of data across different domains  </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Seamless integration between IT and OT environments  </span></li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Facilitation of cross-departmental collaboration, breaking down silos of information  </span></li></ul>                    </div>
		        
                    <div id="sensor-agnostic-best-of-class-tab" class="clearfix eael-tab-content-item inactive" data-title-link="sensor-agnostic-best-of-class-tab">
				        <ul><li>Compatibility and interoperability:  Ensured across all devices to ensure your sensor network operates smoothly and efficiently. This integration focus means you won’t face challenges connecting different sensors and nodes.</li><li>Unified Name Space: Seamless data translation, enabling you to merge multiple sensors into a unified data stream. This integration is crucial for achieving cohesive insights and maximizing the value of your data.</li><li>By combining diverse sensor inputs, we empower you to understand your environment comprehensively. Our solutions enhance decision-making and provide a holistic view of the data landscape.</li><li>Communication technologies include LTE, LoRaWAN, and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE).</li></ul><p>A well-integrated system is key to unlocking sensor technology’s true potential. Our focus on providing high-quality, compatible solutions ensures you have the tools to succeed in a data-driven world.</p><ul><li> Tracking technologies like GPS and RFID for location and inventory management.</li><li> Environmental monitoring with sensors for gas  and liquids ( quality, pressures, levels, leaks,  flows ) </li><li> Detection of odors and dangerous gas levels for safety and quality control.</li><li> Energy management by monitoring energy consumption and liquid levels.</li><li> Security solutions include door controls, access, tracking, and environmental sensors, including  light detection, occupancy, laser</li><li>Laser, radar, l ultrasound-based sensors for distances in various industrial settings, like water levels, containers, dust, or silos. </li><li>Motion measurement with tilt sensors and accelerometers for equipment monitoring.</li><li>Predictive Maintenance: Reduce downtime by 30% or more </li><li style="font-weight: 400"><span style="font-weight: 400">Air Quality: NO</span><span style="font-weight: 400">2 </span><span style="font-weight: 400">Nitrogen Dioxide, SO</span><span style="font-weight: 400">2 </span><span style="font-weight: 400">Sulphur Dioxide, H</span><span style="font-weight: 400">2</span><span style="font-weight: 400">S Hydrogen Sulphide, CH</span><span style="font-weight: 400">2</span><span style="font-weight: 400">O/HCHO Formaldehyde, CO CarbonMonoxide, Cl</span><span style="font-weight: 400">2 </span><span style="font-weight: 400">Chlorine, H</span><span style="font-weight: 400">2 </span><span style="font-weight: 400">Hydrogen, HCI Hydrogen Chloride, HCN Hydrogen Cyanide, HF, Hydrogen Fluoride, NH</span><span style="font-weight: 400">3 </span><span style="font-weight: 400">Ammonia. Data room quality  0.1 ppm dust and particles. </span></li><li>Integration of multiple technologies for enhanced functionality and data accuracy.</li></ul><p>Through our commitment to quality, compatibility, and seamless integration, Senzary is your trusted partner in navigating the complexities of sensor networks, enabling you to harness the full power of the data at your fingertips.</p>                    </div>

				<div class="elementor-element elementor-element-238471a elementor-widget__width-initial elementor-widget-mobile__width-initial elementor-widget-tablet__width-inherit elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="238471a" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-widget_type="text-editor.default">
				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
									<p>Senzary’s shop offers a comprehensive range of industrial IoT products, including sensors, gateways, and accessories. </p><p><strong>What begs a solution? </strong> </p><ul><li>Downtime,</li><li><span style="font-weight: var( --e-global-typography-text-font-weight ); text-transform: var( --e-global-typography-text-text-transform );">Regulatory /Manual Reporting, </span></li><li><span style="font-weight: var( --e-global-typography-text-font-weight ); text-transform: var( --e-global-typography-text-text-transform );">Theft,</span></li><li><span style="font-weight: var( --e-global-typography-text-font-weight ); text-transform: var( --e-global-typography-text-text-transform );">Fines, </span></li><li><span style="font-weight: var( --e-global-typography-text-font-weight ); text-transform: var( --e-global-typography-text-text-transform );">Manual Process,</span></li><li><span style="font-weight: var( --e-global-typography-text-font-weight ); text-transform: var( --e-global-typography-text-text-transform );">Lacking Visibility,</span></li><li><span style="font-weight: var( --e-global-typography-text-font-weight ); text-transform: var( --e-global-typography-text-text-transform );">Untimely Data  </span></li><li><span style="font-weight: var( --e-global-typography-text-font-weight ); text-transform: var( --e-global-typography-text-text-transform );">Worker Safety</span></li></ul><p>WE HAVE THE ANSWER</p><p>Start with <span style="text-decoration: underline;">one module</span> and quickly develop a digital version of your company (locations, areas, assets, devices).</p><p>Add more modules as needed and continue adding as your business requirements grow. </p>								</div>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
